method_description: Block-circulant weight compression (vectorized): each (8×8) sub-block B of W replaced by circ(c) where c_k = (1/b)Σᵢ B[i,(i+k)%b] (diagonal average = LS projection onto circulant subspace). Matrix padded to nearest multiple of b; all blocks extracted and projected in one batched reshape+gather+mean — no Python loops. Conv weights reshaped to 2-D (C_out, C_in·kH·kW) before compression. Eval-only weight cache; training rebuilds on every forward pass for correct autograd.
